programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: After Lily rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal, she returns home to Hawaii where she must help out with her mother's wedding planning business.

programme.title: Baby Obsession
programme.desc: Anna Gray is pregnant and ready to start a family with her loving husband Jon. But she has no idea that Rachel, the mother of a baby who died from SIDS when Anna babysat her years ago, has been waiting for this day, determined to take back what Anna 'took from me'.

programme.title: Dying for a Baby
programme.desc: Amber and Kyle are ready to move on after a car accident two years ago. But their world turns upside down when Jessica, the other driver who lost her unborn baby in the accident, moves in next door and gets a job with Amber’s doctor - all in a plan to seek a cold form of revenge.

programme.title: Anna Lucasta
programme.desc: A young woman struggling with a sordid past finds that her biggest enemy had larger demons than she did.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: A spoof on previous years' epic movies (The Da Vinci Code (2006), The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe (2005) + 20 more), TV series, music videos and celebs. 4 orphans are on an epic adventure.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: After Lily rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal, she returns home to Hawaii where she must help out with her mother's wedding planning business.

programme.title: Coffee Shop
programme.desc: When a young coffee shop owner is threatened with repossession she must take a chance with life and love as she fights to save her business.

programme.title: The Way Ahead
programme.desc: World War II drama that traces a bunch of British draftees as they go through tough basic training and end up getting deployed to North Africa.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: White Squall
programme.desc: A true story about a group of American teenage boys who crew a school sailing ship to gain experience, discipline, or whatever it is that their parents feel they lack.
